data.title: Hick’s Law
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation with a focus on key actions.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements prioritize easy access to commonly used actions.
data.technical_spec: Optimized layout for fast interaction with primary features.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Information is presented in manageable chunks for better retention.
data.technical_spec: Content structured into digestible sections and themes.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetically pleasing designs considered more usable.
data.technical_spec: Modern, clean design with cohesive color palette and typography.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together to intuitively organize information.
data.technical_spec: Strategically placed elements to enhance user understanding.
